steps.desc: See who's around you and what's happening near you right now.

steps.title: Pick your mode
steps.desc:
Local. You know the city.
Exploring. You want to feel it.

steps.title: Jump in
steps.desc: Join an event or open your own spot. Real life starts here.

concept.title:
Not another social network.
Your city, live.
rules: No followers. No feeds. No algorithms.
See who's around. Join what's happening near you.
Real people. Real places. Right now.

seo: Hilads is a real-time social app that helps you meet people nearby and discover things to do in your city. Find events near you, meet locals, and connect with travelers wherever you are. Looking for things to do in Paris? Want to meet locals in Barcelona? Exploring Lisbon and want to find what's happening tonight? Hilads shows you the city, live. No account needed. Just show up.

repeat.titleGeneric: Your city is live right now.
